titleStmt.title: SII 9.482: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 482. (A.R. No. 717 of 1917.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SANKRESVARA TEMPLE AT AGALI, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1432, Pramōda, Āśvayuja, śu. 12, corresponding to A.D. 1510 September 15 Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya. It records that in the districts of Ghanagiri, Gutti, Ghaṇḍikōṭa, Siddhavaṭṭi, Siddhāpura, Chandragiri, Nāgamaṅgala, Muḷuri and Rāyadurga the king abolished the marriage-cess, irrespective of caste, for all time. The record is partly in Sanskrit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1432 ne
ya pramōdasaṁvatsarada Āsvayija śuda 12 yī tithīlu
śrī kṛṣṇarāyaru śrīvirūpākṣa saṁnidhiyali pu(ṁ)ṇyaya
ṇāgraṁṇyamānēna va
śālināva
karaṁgōpe Ācaṁdratārakaṁ dhārāpūrvva
kaṁ muktivā(ṁ)n mudā ghanagiryākyarājyē ca guttirājyē ca viśrutē rā
jyē ghaṁḍikōṭastaḷē śrutē siddavaṭṭi yā siddhāpurasīmākhyaviśrutē
caṁdragiriyākhyarājyasya nāgamaṁgalasīmegaṁ muḷuryyākhyē mahā
rājyē rāyadurggē mahatyapi rājyē tēṣu ca rājyēṣu tēṣu tēṣu vasaṁti yō
nānājātibhidhēstasya vivāhasamayaṁ nijō vadhūvarajanai sarvvardhimānaṁ karaṁ ci
raṁ Ācaṁdratārakaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvakara tiṁmāpuraṁ siṁgaṇa
bhūmipālasya sāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.482 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
